icp_defined.q: Are must-have ICP criteria explicit (role, stage, pain, trigger)?

sources_identified.q: Is there a permitted source matrix (LinkedIn, PH, communities, inbound)?

candidates_have_evidence.q: Does every candidate have fit evidence + source URL (no fabricated names)?

why_now_present.q: Do A-tier candidates have a why-now trigger in the last 90 days?
